next_steps: Obtain stool sample for Clostridium botulinum toxin and culture
Administer BabyBIG (Botulism Immune Globulin Intravenous, Human)
Perform repetitive nerve stimulation (RNS) and needle electromyography (EMG)
Perform full physical examination for tick search
Consult neurology and infectious disease specialists
Continue supportive care and mechanical ventilation
Obtain serum and urine for comprehensive metabolic and toxicologic screening
